hooks.command: osascript -e 'if application "iTerm" is running then' -e 'tell application "System Events"' -e 'set frontApp to name of first application process whose frontmost is true' -e 'end tell' -e 'if frontApp is not "iTerm2" then' -e 'display notification "Claude is waiting for your approval" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"' -e 'end if' -e 'end if'
